message:
test(mysql): add comprehensive unit tests for wire protocol

Add 25 unit tests covering:
- Connection URL parsing (various formats, ports, credentials)
- Length-encoded integer decoding (1-byte, 2-byte, 3-byte, 8-byte)
- Length-encoded string and null-terminated string parsing
- MySqlValue type conversions (bool, i32, i64, f64, bytes, str)
- Packet buffer construction and sequencing
- Authentication hash functions (mysql_native, caching_sha2)
- MySqlColumn struct initialization
- Error display formatting

All tests pass: 25 passed; 0 failed

Part of bd-2e2u: MySQL client implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
